title: Retry deployment of AyurGlow Secrets app

requirements.summary: Retry the full build and deployment of the AyurGlow Secrets application, resolving any errors that caused the previous deployment to fail
acceptanceCriteria: The frontend builds and deploys without errors.
The application is accessible and functional after deployment.

file_operations.description: Review and fix any dependency version conflicts or missing dependencies that may cause build failures. Ensure all required build scripts are present and properly configured.
Verify Vite configuration for proper build output, asset handling, and deployment settings. Ensure the build configuration is compatible with IC deployment requirements.
Check TypeScript configuration for any strict type errors or path resolution issues that could prevent successful compilation.
Verify that the application entry point correctly initializes all providers (React Query, Internet Identity) and mounts the root component without runtime errors.
Ensure the TanStack Router configuration is correct and all routes are properly registered. Verify that the AdminRoute guard component is correctly applied to admin routes.
Verify the actor initialization logic handles both anonymous and authenticated states correctly. Ensure proper error handling for backend connection failures.
Check Internet Identity integration for proper initialization and error handling. Ensure login/logout flows work correctly without causing deployment issues.
Verify the HTML entry point has correct meta tags, title, and script references. Ensure the root div mounting point is properly configured.
Check global CSS imports and Tailwind directives for any syntax errors or broken import paths that could cause build failures.
Verify Tailwind configuration has valid syntax and all custom theme settings are properly defined without causing build errors.
Ensure Navigation component renders without errors and all route links are valid. Verify the component handles authentication state correctly.
Verify HomePage renders correctly with proper data fetching hooks and handles loading/error states. Ensure all image assets reference valid paths under frontend/public/assets/generated/.
Ensure the assets directory structure exists. Create a .gitkeep file if the generated assets folder is missing, which could cause deployment to fail when the app tries to load images.
